name:
I'm on a ledge outside of a window
high above the reactor core
description:
I'm on a ledge outside of a window
high above the reactor core
hints: There is a key here on the ledge. Be careful - you are high above the reactor.
GET KEY - the yellow key is needed for the ID badge machine. Do NOT jump!
GET KEY (yellow) for making maintenance-level ID badges. GO WINDOW to return to the visitors room safely.
GET KEY then GO WINDOW to return inside. JUMPing down triggers the bomb and is extremely dangerous.

effects: Message: Oh Boy...I think I did something...
Message: *   B O O O O O O O O O M ! * * * * * *

notes: Ledge outside the visitor room window, high above the reactor core. Contains the yellow key (needed for maintenance-level ID badge). JUMPing causes an explosion. GO WINDOW returns safely to room 13.
